---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Stop a VRMA animation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/vrma/stop"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Stop the currently playing VRMA animation identified by asset on the specified VRM entity.
